description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-06-01T06:05:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 1 June 2026:
Park Island Transport Company Limited
'Ma Wan - Central' Route:
- Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route:
- Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled
- Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
.
2026-06-01T06:05:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年6⽉1⽇作出臨時調整：
珀麗灣客運有限公司
「⾺灣-中環」航線：
-⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
-中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運

「⾺灣-荃灣」航線：
-⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次
-荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次
。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) runs additional train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車服務

2026-06-11T20:45:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that, as informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, the following temporary train trips will be added: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station ● 19 Jun: G5838, G5840, G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868 ● 21 Jun: G5866 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station ● 21 Jun: G9540, G5680 From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station ● 19 Jun: G5837, G5839, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867 ● 21 Jun: G5865 From Shenzhenbei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station ● 21 Jun: G5679 From Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station ● 19 Jun: G9539 Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website or mobile app; appointed travel agents (refer to: https://www.highspeed.mtr.com.hk/res/pdf/list-of-ticket-agents.pdf);orat Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. For train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website or mobile app, or the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
2026-06-11T20:45:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，中國內地鐵路部門通知，高速鐵路（香港段）將加開以下臨時列車車次： 由香港西九龍站前往福田站 ●6月19日：G5838,G5840,G5842,G5844,G5846,G5848,G5850,G5852,G5854,G5856,G5868 ●6月21日：G5866 由香港西九龍站前往深圳北站 ●6月21日：G9540,G5680 由福田站前往香港西九龍站 ●6月19日：G5837,G5839,G5841,G5843,G5845,G5847,G5849,G5851,G5853,G5855,G5867 ●6月21日：G5865 由深圳北站前往香港西九龍站 ●6月21日：G5679 由廣州南站前往香港西九龍站 ●6月19日：G9539 乘客可透過12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、指定代理（瀏覽：https://www.highspeed.mtr.com.hk/res/pdf/list-of-ticket-agents.pdf）或前往香港西九龍站購買列車車票。 有關列車服務詳情，請瀏覽12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。
